title: Đậu Câu Nước Dừa

sections.heading: Nguyên liệu · Ingredients
items: 1 fresh coconut — use the water inside (nước dừa tươi), about 1–1.5 cups
1 can (13.5 oz) coconut cream (nước cốt dừa)
¾ cup sugar (đường), or to taste

sections.heading: Cách làm · Instructions
steps: Layer 1: Crack open the fresh coconut and pour the water into a pot. Add the cup of water and the sugar. Add the agar-agar powder and a pinch of salt.
Bring the mixture to a boil over medium heat, stirring constantly until the agar-agar dissolves completely. Stir well until fully dissolved.
Pour into a mold and let the first layer begin to set.
Layer 2: Heat the coconut cream. Once the first layer has partially set, pour the coconut cream layer on top.
Let it cool to room temperature, then refrigerate until fully set, about 2–3 hours.
Once set, cut into pieces or unmold onto a plate. Serve chilled.
